headline: Clear calendar and no inbound messages — use today to drive deep progress on the two open Evals UX tickets before the next bi-weekly review cycle.

quick_wins.task: Pick up AE-1079: draft the 'no ground truth' design doc outline
quick_wins.why: It's still in To Do and is a writing task you can unblock quickly by getting a first skeleton committed today

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake integration credentials
quick_wins.why: Both data sources are broken — you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics; file IT ticket or rotate tokens now

must_make_progress.task: AE-744: Advance the Justification + Actual vs Expected UX for all Evaluators
must_make_progress.why: Major-priority, In Progress, no due date set — this is your flagship evals deliverable and maps directly to the 'evals' line in the Agents Big Rock OKR

must_make_progress.task: AE-1079: Write first draft of the generated evaluations 'no ground truth' design doc
must_make_progress.why: Supports the evals adoption OKR; having a reviewable draft unblocks engineering and design feedback

must_communicate_with.about: Align on AE-1079 scope: confirm whether 'no ground truth' evaluations need to tie into the Context Engineering or Memory roadmap items
Confirm that AE-744 UX covers both low-code and coded evaluator paths — get early review commitment

must_report_status.to: Agents Big Rock leadership (referenced in bi-weekly TR)
must_report_status.note: Next bi-weekly TR is approaching; update the Confluence page with current status so you're not scrambling last minute

agents_in_production.vs_goal: Snowflake auth broken — fix credentials to restore visibility

evals_adoption.vs_goal: Key OKR metric; cannot track until Snowflake access is restored

flags: Salesforce authentication is broken — no visibility into customer escalations or high-priority cases. Risk of missing an SLA.
Snowflake credentials are empty — product telemetry and adoption metrics are completely dark. This blocks OKR reporting.
AE-744 has no due date set despite Major priority; consider setting a target date to create accountability.
No Slack activity in last 16h — unusually quiet; verify Slack integration is working correctly.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today — priority is restoring observability (Salesforce/Snowflake) and advancing the two evals tickets that directly support the Agents Big Rock OKR.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are unavailable due to broken Snowflake auth; advancing AE-744 and AE-1079 are the primary adoption-driving levers this sprint.

slack_summary: No meetings, no inbound messages — today is a rare deep-work day. Top priorities: (1) push AE-744 Evals UX forward significantly since it's your Major-priority in-flight deliverable, and (2) get a first draft of the AE-1079 'no ground truth' design doc started. Also critical: both Salesforce and Snowflake integrations are broken, leaving you blind on escalations and adoption metrics — get credentials fixed ASAP. Zero meetings today.
